decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly and efficiently assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful game-winning threat. The deck is built to control the game with counterspells like Counterspell and Foil while digging through the deck with spells like Opt and Portent. With the ability to quickly find and protect the combo pieces, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and win through a strong and unexpected combo.

This deck revolves around utilizing Oath of Druids to control the board and summon powerful creatures like Terravore. It includes cards like Swords to Plowshares and Naturalize for removal and disruption, as well as Sphere of Resistance to slow down opponents. The deck also features land destruction with cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port, along with mana acceleration from Mox Diamond. The goal is to maintain control of the game while setting up powerful creatures and disrupting the opponent's strategy.

The deck focuses on using cards like Hermit Druid and Survival of the Fittest to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures. This enables the player to reanimate powerful creatures like Akroma, Angel of Wrath and Psychatog to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Additionally, cards like Karmic Guide and Animate Dead provide additional ways to return creatures from the graveyard. The deck also includes different combo pieces like Phyrexian Devourer and Triskelion to finish off the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to set up a strong board presence and win the game through powerful combos and reanimation.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to cheat out a powerful creature while countering any potential threats. The deck relies on control elements such as Counterspell, Foil, and Thwart to protect the combo, with card drawing spells like Impulse and Gush to find key pieces. Additional tools like Peek, Vision Charm, and Portent help to dig through the deck for combo pieces, while cards like Chain of Vapor and Daze provide additional disruption and protection. A versatile and efficient strategy tailored to the Combo-Stiflenought archetype in a Premodern 1 vs 1 format.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Hermit Druid combo to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures and then reanimate or copy them for a powerful board presence. The deck includes a variety of cards that help to facilitate this combo, such as Survival of the Fittest and Reanimate. Additionally, there are cards like Cabal Therapy and City of Brass to support the combo strategy and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By effectively utilizing the graveyard and various combo pieces, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory.

This deck focuses on manipulating the opponent's game plan through a combination of card draw, counterspells, and disruption while simultaneously growing its own threats. Utilizing cards like Portent and Sleight of Hand to control the draw, as well as powerful creatures like Quirion Dryad and Psychatog to apply pressure. The deck also includes versatile spells like Fire/Ice and Swords to Plowshares for removal, while ensuring mana efficiency with cards like Gush and Gemstone Mine. The inclusion of cards like Meddling Mage and Armageddon further disrupts the opponent's strategy, making it difficult for them to execute their game plan effectively.

The deck focuses on using Ill-Gotten Gains in combination with cards like Lotus Petal and Dark Ritual to quickly set up a game-winning Brain Freeze combo. Intuition helps to tutor for key pieces, while Cephalid Coliseum provides card draw. The deck also includes disruption with cards like Tormod's Crypt and Chain of Vapor. It aims to quickly assemble the necessary pieces for the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan, allowing for a quick win through milling with Brain Freeze.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with low-cost, high-damage creatures and burn spells. The strategy is to play aggressively, dealing damage as quickly as possible to win before the opponent can stabilize. Cards like Lightning Bolt, Mogg Fanatic, and Ball Lightning help keep up the pressure, while Fireblast provides a powerful finisher. The inclusion of Grim Lavamancer and Cursed Scroll adds extra versatility and reach to the deck. With efficient creatures and burn spells, this Aggro - Sligh deck aims to win fast and decisively.

The main idea behind this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using Mox Diamond and Armageddon to disrupt your opponent's resources and then play aggressive creatures like Nimble Mongoose and Werebear to quickly close out the game. The deck also utilizes land destruction like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to further hinder your opponent's ability to play spells. The inclusion of cards like Sylvan Library and Mulch help to maintain card advantage and ensure you have the resources you need to keep up the pressure on your opponent.

This deck focuses on playing Phyrexian Dreadnought along with Stifle to create a powerful combo that can quickly overwhelm opponents. By using a combination of cantrips, counterspells, and card draw, the deck aims to efficiently dig for the necessary pieces while disrupting the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of cards like Portent and Peek provide additional card selection and information about the opponent's hand, allowing for more informed decision-making. The goal is to enact the combo as quickly and as efficiently as possible while maintaining control over the game.

This deck focuses on casting cheap and efficient burn spells to quickly lower the opponent's life total. It includes a mix of direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, along with creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Ball Lightning that can deal damage directly to the opponent. Additional damage is added with Sulfuric Vortex and Pyrostatic Pillar. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless stream of damage, using cards like Fireblast as a finisher. The mana base is primarily focused on producing red mana for the deck's numerous red spells.

The focus of this deck is to quickly assemble and protect the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat that can win the game in a single turn. The deck includes a variety of cantrips and counter spells to help find and protect the combo pieces, while also including some disruption cards like Chain of Vapor and Thwart. The goal is to control the game until the combo can be assembled and then quickly close out the game before the opponent has a chance to respond.

The deck focuses on using enchantments to create a powerful combo that can generate massive amounts of card draw and mana, while also controlling the opponent's board through effects like Parallax Wave and Seal of Cleansing. The key strategy revolves around cards like Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to continuously draw into more enchantments, eventually leading to a game-winning Replenish to bring back all enchantments from the graveyard. The deck also uses Opalescence to turn enchantments into creatures, providing an alternate win condition.

The main idea of this deck is to use the cards in combination to quickly fill up your graveyard with creatures, allowing you to bring them back into play with cards like Animate Dead and Shallow Grave. This strategy allows you to quickly overwhelm your opponent with powerful creatures, such as Psychatog and Akroma, Angel of Wrath. The deck also includes cards like Survival of the Fittest and Cabal Therapy to help you search for the cards you need and disrupt your opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on using low-cost goblin creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. The key strategy involves utilizing Goblin Lackey to put powerful goblins into play for free, supported by Goblin Matron to search for key creatures like Goblin Warchief and Siege-Gang Commander. Gempalm Incinerator and Goblin Sharpshooter provide removal and control options, while Wasteland and Rishadan Port disrupt the opponent's mana base. The deck aims to maintain consistent pressure and board presence to secure a swift victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of aggressive Goblin creatures. By utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey to cheat creatures into play, Goblin Warchief to reduce costs, and Siege-Gang Commander for additional tokens, the deck aims to create a fast and powerful board presence. Cards like Sneak Attack and Gempalm Incinerator provide additional utility and removal options. With a strong mana base and a focus on early aggression, this Goblin tribal deck aims to put pressure on the opponent and secure a quick victory.
